title: Update Monday Doc by submit workform
excerpt:
I’m trying to have user fill out project statement document by having him fill out a form. 
Is there anyway to do it using work forms? Typeform or anything else

posts.author: Amit_VGM (Amit)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m trying to have user fill out project statement document by having him fill out a form.

Is there anyway to do it using work forms? Typeform or anything else

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Amit,

It sounds like you could set this up using our Workforms feature! For some background, columns in your board make up the questions in your form, and when a form is submitted the information populates the columns (and items). Have you tested our forms feature out? Are there any limitations you’re running into?

posts.author: Amit_VGM (Amit)
posts.cookedHtml: I know I can di that but I was wonder if there is a way without using the board columns

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: I am afraid not at this point - apologies for the setback!
